title: HTML Tokenization, Tree Construction, goquery, and Parser Differentials · Go Semantics Case: Parser Browser Diff
summary: Source markup is treated as browser DOM, tokenizer and tree APIs are mixed, goquery is assumed to run JavaScript, malformed HTML repair is never tested. Predict owner authority, URL and HTTP state, Go ownership, bounded work, accessibility impact, failure, cleanup, and evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the crawler go parser browser diff increment in budgeted Go HTML tree adapter. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case pra…
objectives: Compare Go tree results with controlled browser DOM for risk-bearing cases and classify every material difference.
Test implied elements, misnesting, tables, templates, foreign content, comments, duplicate attributes, and deep input.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
